name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: These premium UV protection sunglasses are designed to protect your eyes from harmful sun rays while enhancing your summer style. Lightweight frame and high-quality lenses ensure long-lasting comfort and durability.

name: Summer Cotton T-Shirt
description: Stay cool and comfortable with this breathable cotton t-shirt. Perfect for hot weather, casual outings, and everyday use with a modern stylish fit.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Advanced SPF 50 sunscreen that protects your skin from UVA and UVB rays. Lightweight formula keeps your skin hydrated without feeling greasy.

name: Beach Straw Hat
description: Stylish straw hat designed to protect you from sunlight while adding elegance to your summer look. Lightweight and breathable.

name: Flip Flop Sandals
description: Comfortable and lightweight flip flop sandals perfect for beach days and casual wear. Anti-slip sole ensures safe walking.

name: Hydration Water Bottle
description: Reusable BPA-free water bottle that keeps you hydrated during hot summer days. Durable, leak-proof, and easy to carry.

name: Beach Travel Bag
description: Spacious and stylish beach travel bag with water-resistant material. Perfect for carrying all your summer essentials.

name: Cooling Face Mist
description: Refreshing face mist that hydrates and cools your skin instantly. Ideal for hot summer days and daily skincare routine.

name: Men's Summer Shorts
description: Comfortable and breathable summer shorts designed for casual wear and outdoor activities. Stylish and easy to pair.

name: Portable Mini Fan
description: Compact portable mini fan with powerful airflow and long battery life. Perfect for travel, office, and outdoor use.
